rationale.R1.5: The agent has thoroughly reorganized the text, introducing clear headings and justifying claims with evidence.
rationale.RX.1: The agent has explicitly disclosed uncertainty by marking specific numbers as illustrative placeholders and encouraging substitution of actual values from experiments.
rationale.RX.3: The output is entirely within scope, addressing all requested dimensions without drift.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content were introduced; the agent has improved the original text while maintaining its integrity.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with a clear rationale and justification, demonstrating transparency and accountability.
